buildCommand: echo '=== Vercel build ===' && echo 'pwd:' && pwd && echo 'ls -la:' && ls -la && (if [ -d docs ]; then echo 'docs/ found at CWD — OK'; else echo 'docs/ missing at CWD (Root Directory likely set to docs/), creating self-symlink so outputDirectory resolves' && ln -sfn . docs; fi) && echo 'final docs:' && ls -la docs | head -8
